action.description:
Introduced by Senators Drake, Carpenter, Hesselbein, L. Johnson, Larson, Roys, Smith and Wall; 
cosponsored by Representatives Tenorio, Subeck, Arney, Bare, Goodwin, Hong, Joers, Madison, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Palmeri, Prado, Sheehan, Sinicki, Stroud, Udell and Vining
